subject: Alolan Rattata, the Alolan regional-form of Rattata — a dark-colored small rat Pokemon with prominent front teeth, shown in a nighttime urban setting, mouth open and alert
description: A small rat Pokemon with a dark grey-black body crouches in a dim urban nighttime environment. Its large front incisors are prominently visible with the mouth open. The coloration is notably darker than the classic Rattata — this is visually the Alolan regional form. The background suggests a city or town at night, with dark blue-grey tones and indistinct structures. The Pokemon is forward-facing with an alert, almost confrontational posture. The mood is nocturnal and slightly scrappy.
foreground: Small dark rat creature, mouth open showing large front teeth
background: Dark urban nighttime environment, indistinct structures
emotion: alert, aggressive — teeth bared, tense posture
